entities.name: Nira
entities.context: Company that maps and routes networks; understands who is connected to whom and how

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company; explains who people are at a deeper level—values, working style, strengths, and story

entities.name: Network mapping
entities.context: Nira's core capability of understanding connection topology

entities.name: Deep fit matching
entities.context: Matching people based on values and working style rather than keywords or titles

entities.name: Careerspan API
entities.context: API needed for Nira to consume Careerspan data; identified as dependency

entities.name: Careerspan data model
entities.context: Stable data model required for Nira integration

relationships.context: Partnership opportunity; complementary capabilities (routing vs. understanding)
Core value proposition—maps and routes the network
Enables matching based on deeper understanding of people
Dependency: Careerspan needs to build API for partnership
Dependency: stable data model required for Nira integration
